overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a dystopian urban environment at dusk. The scene features industrial architecture with elevated highways, neon signage, and a mix of commercial and industrial buildings under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with elevated highway and commercial buildings

events.description: camera briefly turns left showing character's face in profile
waiting at crosswalk as vehicles pass through intersection

agents.ego_description: walking along city sidewalk approaching intersection, observing traffic and surroundings

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along the street through intersection

entered.detail: massive elevated highway with glowing red neon structural supports
tall concrete industrial tower with illuminated 09 signage near top
green commercial building with illuminated signage and graffiti
large purple and yellow advertisement billboard for Jet Sail
tall palm tree on sidewalk near building entrance

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a dystopian city street at dusk, approaching an intersection beneath a massive elevated highway with red neon lights. The industrial tower marked 09 dominates the skyline ahead, while a green commercial building with graffiti and a palm tree line the left sidewalk. Vehicles pass through the intersection as the player waits at the crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: small commercial shop entrance with neon signage

events.description: entering small corner shop with glowing red OPEN neon sign
exiting shop back onto the street

agents.ego_description: approaching shop entrance, briefly entering to look at interior shelves, then exiting back to street

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white tank top and bandages visible inside the shop

entered.detail: small storefront with glass doors and glowing red OPEN neon sign
interior shelves with various items visible through entrance

segments.scene_description: The player turns toward a small corner shop with a glowing red OPEN sign, briefly enters to observe the interior with shelves of goods, then exits back to the street. The environment shifts from the open sidewalk to the sheltered shop entrance, with the Jet Sail billboard now closer on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with large utility structures and exhaust pipes

events.description: large industrial cylinder building temporarily blocks view of street ahead
entering deep shadow beneath elevated highway overpass

agents.ego_description: walking past industrial buildings and large pipe structures, approaching covered area under highway

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white tank top walking ahead on sidewalk

entered.detail: massive cylindrical concrete structure with vertical blue illuminated symbols
enormous curved industrial pipe connecting buildings overhead

segments.scene_description: Exiting the shop area, the player walks past a massive cylindrical industrial building with glowing blue symbols and a large curved exhaust pipe overhead. The sidewalk transitions to distinctive orange paving as the player enters the shadow of the elevated highway overpass, following a pedestrian in a white tank top.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway with industrial piping

events.description: passing group of pedestrians gathered on street corner

agents.ego_description: walking under the elevated highway through industrial corridor, passing pedestrians on the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow plaid shirt walking toward camera
group of three pedestrians standing on street corner ahead

entered.detail: large green industrial pipes running vertically along building facade
tall street lamp with glowing orange light fixture

segments.scene_description: The player continues walking under the massive elevated highway overpass through a shaded industrial corridor. The orange paved sidewalk continues alongside buildings with large green industrial pipes. The player passes a pedestrian in a yellow plaid shirt and approaches a group of people gathered on the corner ahead, with street lamps providing orange illumination in the low light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dystopian city street that transitions from an open urban intersection into a shaded industrial corridor. It begins at a crosswalk beneath a massive elevated highway with red neon lights, where a towering industrial structure dominates the skyline and graffiti-covered buildings line the sidewalk. As the camera turns, it briefly enters a small corner shop with a glowing red sign before exiting back to the street, bringing a Jet Sail billboard into closer view. The scene then shifts toward a massive cylindrical building with glowing blue symbols and a curved exhaust pipe, with the sidewalk transitioning to distinctive orange paving as the camera enters the shadow of the overpass. Finally, the movement continues through the dim industrial corridor alongside large green pipes, passing pedestrians and approaching a gathered group of people under the orange glow of street lamps.
